data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Focused on minimizing choices to enhance the speed of decision-making when users select content.
data.technical_spec: Recommendation engine limits the number of top suggestions displayed.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interface designs that minimize the distance and size of interactive elements, ensuring efficient navigation.
data.technical_spec: Optimized UI for consistent button placement and size across devices.

data.title: Doherty Threshold
data.description: Netflix ensures high-speed interactions so that users remain engaged and wait times are reduced.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of asynchronous loading of content and predictive streaming.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: User menus leverage the principle that items at the beginning and end of a list are most memorable.
data.technical_spec: Algorithmic curation of content displays to maximize user engagement.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Design adhering to users' expectations based on patterns learned from similar platforms.
data.technical_spec: Interface consistency across Netflix experiences in mobile, web, and smart TVs.
